notes: Shopify store. Config-driven Shopify routing (adapters/shopify-config.ts): matched by origin host carolinadental.com OR distributor alias, then extracted via the shared /products.json catalog path (shopify-catalog-extraction.ts) with the per-page HTML adapter (adapters/shopify.ts) as the fallback tier. variant.sku -> supplier SKU, product.vendor -> brand, variant.price (dollars string) -> price, variant.available -> stock. Shopify strips variant.barcode from the public list /products.json, so expect no GTIN/UPC (no lot/expiry barcode hook) and no unit_of_measure, same limitation as our other Shopify-sourced suppliers.
